title: Information Sharing Standard — Purpose and Scope
description: New Zealand government standard requiring public service agencies to implement legally binding information sharing agreements when providing non-government third parties access to personal information. Establishes best practices for protecting personal data, managing risk through due diligence, and ensuring appropriate controls are in place.
